prose: **Phenol Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. This task identified the most electrophilic site (C atom 3, f⁺ = 2.1028319) and most nucleophilic site (O atom 1, f⁻ = 0.16201477) via Mulliken partial charges differences. These reactivity indices characterize sites susceptible to attack by nucleophiles or electrophiles, respectively. Warnings related to charge conservation in f⁺ and f⁻: "sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)" and "sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)" — these did not affect the integrity-trustworthy status of the results. Files generated include the reactivity bar plot at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gpt-4o/20260704-150103_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
